digest.title: Introducing Claude Tag
digest.tldr: Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.

digest.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
digest.tldr: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior.  The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

digest.title: Fired by Google for creating the Google workspace CLI
Google Home will soon get better at recognizing you
digest.tldr: A new update for Google Home could make it less likely your smart home cameras mistake you for someone else, just because you're facing away from the camera.

digest.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
digest.tldr: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
